return(function(a,n,T,l,i,Z,W,I,b,f,H,j,Q,m,g,K,N,R,r,p,s,V)V,R,I,j,g,K,p,m,H,f,b,N,Q,s,r=function(V,T,l,i)local o,e,q,S,d,G3,h,r,v,j,T3,c,w,D,A,J,t,s,i3,y,a3,Y,k,C,V3,u,W,L,M,B,K3,l3,F,z,K,x,P,O,W3,I,n3,Z3,E,X,U,R3 while V do if V<7480966-(-758056)then if V<-458435+5311515 then if V<937750+1192878 then if
